title: The Last Night Abroad
content: On the final night of her journey, Emma walked slowly through streets that had become familiar over several weeks. Restaurants, parks, and cafés that once felt foreign now carried personal memories. She visited favorite locations one last time and paid attention to details she might soon forget: the sound of conversations in another language, the glow of streetlights on old buildings, and the rhythm of daily life around her. Travel often involved anticipation and discovery, but departures carried their own emotions. As Emma returned to her hotel, she felt both gratitude and sadness. Every meaningful journey eventually ended, leaving only memories and the desire to return someday.
